meta.note_fps: All Phase-1 reports use fps=30 (22800 frames total). The user-supplied template suggested fps=25, but that would conflict with every upstream artifact; fps=30 is authoritative.
meta.note_script_vs_real: Script planned 570s, Daniel improvised to 760s. Kobalt-Reveal (194.6-242.9s) is NOT in script but is the REAL emotional climax (Intensity 10). Schweiz-Loesung (548.9-602.6s) is scripted climax but acts as warm payoff (Intensity 9) per Daniel's actual pacing. CTA drifted from scripted 55-75% to real 83.9%.

real_climax.treatment: CENTERPIECE — highest polish investment: Fullscreen takeover + Deep Boom #2 + Teal-Orange shift + 2.7s riser + post-reveal EU-Critical StatCard

scripted_climax.treatment: Warm payoff after the storm — Gold grade, warm-bass-hit (NOT deep boom), KenBurns Schweiz BG, tonal whoosh. Calming, not building.

story_arc.deviation_note: Daniel improvised +190s vs script. Kobalt is real peak (not in script). Schweiz repositioned from climax to resolution. CTA drift 55-75% -> 83.9% is accepted (not fixable without re-take); compensated by early soft-CTA visibility at 47s (ovl-006).

conflicts_resolved.description: 1E pre-computed color plan without 1A output; estimated Hook tag as 'cool-desaturated-exhaustion' overriding D1.1 warm-hook rule. 1A now confirms seg_001 is 'pain' hook (Intensity 8) and seg_002 is 'shock/anchor' peak (Intensity 9).
conflicts_resolved.resolution: 1E col_001 (cool, 0-40s) is correct — both pain-hook (0-21.5s) and shock-peak anchor (21.5-50.7s) benefit from cool-desaturated grade. No change. 1E's hook-override was a lucky correct call.

conflicts_resolved.description: 1E assigned single Teal-Orange window to col_004 'est_seg_004_peak_null_cent' (320-360s) based on script estimation. 1A reveals Kobalt (194.6-242.9s) is REAL Peak 1 at Intensity 10, higher than Null-Cent (Intensity 9).
conflicts_resolved.resolution: MOVE primary Teal-Orange window to Kobalt (5838-7278f / 194.6-242.9s). Keep a SECOND shorter Teal-Orange window on Null-Cent refrain (9981-11208f / 332.7-373.6s). Budget used: 2 of 3 T&O allowed. Schweiz (col_007) stays Gold — never Teal-Orange in resolution per D1.3 rule 8.

conflicts_resolved.description: 1B flags CRITICAL 48s dead zone 618.1-666s (between ovl-035 and ovl-036). 1D's talking-head table shows 607-635s = 28s OK, then breathing pause 635-640s, then CTA fullscreen PI at 645s. 1D's plan already partly covers the gap but leaves 618.1-635s as clean talking-head before the intended breath pause.
conflicts_resolved.resolution: ACCEPT 1B's NewsCard fill ('HANDELSBLATT · FAZ · NICHTS GEFUNDEN · LINK BMF-PDF') starting at 645s and running through 666s — this IS the CTA PI from 1D, unified. The 618.1-635s segment (Daniels Reflexions-Phase) is accepted as talking-head because it sits immediately BEFORE the scheduled breath pause and is bookended by ovl-035 which runs until 618.1s. Effective clean talking-head window: 618.1-635s = 16.9s (well within 45s budget). Breath pause 635-640s preserved.

conflicts_resolved.description: Script plan: CTA at 55-75% (418-570s). Real: Hard CTA at 638s (83.9%). Soft BMF-link mention already at ~47s. Options: (a) accept, (b) cut CTA block, (c) cut outro.
conflicts_resolved.resolution: ACCEPT real timing (option a). Rationale: the China-Chronology + Kein-Zufall-Kette are narratively load-bearing, cannot be cut. Compensation: reinforce SOFT-CTA visibility at ovl-006 (1410-1695f / 47-56.5s) by running it a full 9.5s as a Lower-Third so viewers have already seen the BMF-PDF link visually by the 7% mark. The HARD-CTA at 638s is non-negotiable (real).

conflicts_resolved.description: Script staged Schweiz-Loesung as emotional climax. Daniel delivered Kobalt-Reveal as actual climax (Intensity 10 vs 9). Polish-investment asymmetry must be resolved.
conflicts_resolved.resolution: Kobalt (5838-7278f) = CENTERPIECE: Fullscreen Takeover (ovl-015), Deep Boom #2, 2.73s Riser, Teal-Orange grade shift, post-reveal EU-Critical StatCard (ovl-016), max Polish. Schweiz (16467-18078f) = WARM PAYOFF: LocationCard (ovl-034) with Schweiz KenBurns BG, Gold grade (col_007), Tonal Whoosh + Warm Bass Hit (NOT deep boom), calming piano/strings music bed mb-04. Schweiz receives RESOLUTION polish, not climax polish.

conflicts_resolved.description: 1A notes seg_007 (Kobalt Peak 10) is directly followed by seg_008 (Rueckwirkungs-Rant Peak 8) without a valley between them — narratively intended empoerungs-block but technically violates E2 'after HIGH MUSS LOW'.
conflicts_resolved.resolution: ACCEPT narrative cluster. Technical compensation: after ovl-015 Fullscreen (Kobalt end 6324f / 210.8s) insert a 20-frame visual silence (col_003 cool hold, no overlay) 210.8-230.3s (5850-6909f = 19.5s) before ovl-016 StatCard comes in. This is the micro-valley. Audio: mb-02 music bed stays at 0.034 ambient, no new SFX, light breath pause. It's not a full valley but it's a decompression pocket.

conflicts_resolved.description: 1D proposes 17 Pattern Interrupts including 5 fullscreen-takeovers. B5 caps fullscreen-takeovers at 2-3 per video. 1B also proposes 3 fullscreens (ovl-005, ovl-015, ovl-024).
conflicts_resolved.resolution: 1B's 3 fullscreens (ovl-005 at 39.1s '0 CENT', ovl-015 at 194.6s 'KOBALT', ovl-024 at 362.4s '0,00 EUR MEHR') are APPROVED as the canonical 3. Of 1D's proposed fullscreens, only the ones matching 1B are kept; the others are DOWNGRADED: 1D PI at 28s (9. APRIL 2026 SCHLUSSSTRICH) becomes a KineticText overlay (not fullscreen); 1D PI at 246.5s (Zweitens #2) becomes chapter-marker KineticText (ovl-017); 1D PI at 293.58s (Drittens #3) becomes chapter-marker KineticText (ovl-020); 1D PI at 645s (CTA Takeover) becomes NewsCard + LowerThird (not fullscreen). Fullscreen budget: 3/3. Letterbox budget 2/3 (339.4s, 743s). Color-shift budget: 2 T&O (Kobalt, Null-Cent) + 1 warm-accent (Danke Berlin). Glitch: 1 (ovl-030). All within limits.

conflicts_resolved.description: 1B flags 56.6-66.7s = 10.1s gap between ovl-006 (CTA link) and ovl-007 (Indium chip). Suggested: optional micro-bounce.
conflicts_resolved.resolution: Accept as clean-phase. 10.1s is within 15-25s overlay frequency target (C2.2). MicroBounce on Daniel only, no new overlay. Zoom-Change B-Roll PI at 62s (1D) covers the midpoint.

rejection_reasons.sfx-018: Soft-click tick on 'Privatanleger' at 67.6s is redundant — the keyword overlay already triggers visual attention. Remove to thin the tick-cluster in seg_003 (context). Keeps seg_003 audio sparser per C2 breathing-cadence.
rejection_reasons.sfx-019: Soft-click tick on 'Indium' at 71.14s — same rationale as sfx-018. Keeping only sfx-020 'Renium' and sfx-021 as the listicle-click rhythm. Net: 1 tick per 3 keywords instead of 3 ticks per 3 keywords.

placements: sfx-riser-drei-mal @ 14370f (8s major to Drei mal duerft ihr raten)

silences.note: 4 of 11 silences are the 15f pre-high-impact silences required by A1.

3A_sound.music_ducking_policy: Sidechain duck -6dB under voice; full 0 during the 11 silence cues; swell +3dB during breath pauses at 503.9-510s and 635-640s (mb-04 ambient).

approved_overlays.content: OHNE PARLAMENT · OHNE VORWARNUNG · OHNE UEBERGANG

approved_overlays.note: Promoted to MUST per C004 resolution — early soft-CTA visibility compensation
Warm payoff, NOT climax polish. Gold grade, tonal whoosh only.
NEW overlay to fill 1B critical dead zone 618.1-666s. 4 Presse-Logos with red X-marks. Slides in from right at end of breath pause.

new_components_to_build.description: 4 Presse-Logos (Handelsblatt, FAZ, Manager Magazin, Bloomberg DE) stagger-reveal with red X-mark stamps overlaid. 3D-rotate entrance, 60-75% screen width.

new_components_to_build.name: KobaltFullscreen
new_components_to_build.description: CENTERPIECE component. Large 'KOBALT' title (200pt Orbitron 900), Element-Symbol 'Co' chip, Atomic Number 27, teal-orange gradient BG, screen-shake 8f on impact, deep-boom sync. Max polish tier — human design review required.

3B_mograph.cognitive_load_constraint: Max 4 elements on screen (Daniel counts as 1). Overlays ovl-007 (cognitive_load_after 2), ovl-008 (3), ovl-016 (3), ovl-019 (3), ovl-025 (3), ovl-028 (3), ovl-031 (3), ovl-034 (3), ovl-037 (3) are at the 3-of-4 threshold — Phase 3B must not stack any additional element on top.
3B_mograph.face_safe_zone: x:760-1160 y:80-560 (no overlays in this box — all positions reserved for Daniel's face)

3C_zoom_edit.cut_points_source: 1D cut_points array (71 snapped to real captions.ts sentence boundaries)

Pre-Kobalt crash zoom before fullscreen takeover
KenBurns on Schweiz location photo BG (ovl-034). Drift up-left to mountain.
Closer: slow push-in for intimacy on 'Danke, Deutschland'

pattern_interrupts_approved.note: Downgraded from 1D fullscreen. Covered by ovl-002/003 sequence.

color_shift_peak.note: Kobalt T&O, Null-Cent T&O, Drei-mal color-shift

color_segments.note: Extended from 1E's 0-40s to 0-50.7s to cover seg_002 BMF-shock-anchor. 1E's cool-hook override aligns with 1A pain-tag.
Short cool ramp before Kobalt T&O peak. Transition_out 20f is asymmetric fast-in for Kobalt.

USER OVERRIDE: Teal-Orange ist NICHT LOCOS-Brand (das ist Frechdachs-Look + generischer Hollywood). Daniels Schock-Look = LOCOS Premium Grade als Basis (Kontrast 1.12, Saettigung -8%, warm Gold-Tint) + selektiver Rot-Akzent (#E30613 LOCOS Rot) auf Kobalt-Element/Element-Symbol. Hintergrund warmes Schwarz #161514. Vignette stark (0.42). Tentative — nach erstem Render anpassen.
Post-Kobalt sustained cool peak. Rueckwirkungs-Rant + Drittens chapter. Non-T&O to preserve budget.
USER OVERRIDE: identisch zu col_004 Logik. LOCOS-Premium-Base + Rot-Akzent auf 'Null Cent'-Zahlen (selektiv via mask). Tentative.
Includes breath pause 503.9-510s (no effect motion). Clean neutral bridge.
WARM PAYOFF not climax. Gold-temperature per D1 rule. NO Teal-Orange (D1.3 Rule 8 forbids T&O in resolution). Daniels Schweiz-Zitat + antizyklisch core-message.
Includes breath pause 635-640s. CTA warm per D1.1 rule.

3E_text.caption_strategy: YouTube-native CC (not burned in). Overlays are the visual emphasis layer.

font_policy.caption_duplication_check: Overlays ERGAENZEN captions, duplicate NEVER. Redundancy-check flagged 0 fails in 1B.

master_timeline.notes: Cold open. 'Leute, ich bin absolut erschrocken'. Pain-hook, NO warm welcome. Daniel is tired, not friendly.

pattern_interrupt.note: Downgraded from 1D fullscreen to KineticText (C007). Covered by ovl-003.

master_timeline.notes: Hero anchor dump + first FullscreenTakeover (ovl-005 '0 CENT MEHR STEUERN'). DEEP BOOM #1 on '9. April'. Triple staccato rhythm on 'ohne Parlament/Vorwarnung/Uebergangsfristen'.
Valley after Peak-Shock. Necessary E2 LOW after HIGH. Includes early Soft-CTA (ovl-006 LINK BMF).
22 Jahre anchor build-up. 'Aufgehoben, ein Satz, Seite 7'. Transitions out to cool rising grade.
Loop L3 opens. 'Bruch nicht Update' kinetic-text peak.
L4 opens (Kobalt cliffhanger). 2.73s riser builds under 'Erstens... das eine Wort...'. Silence at 5823f.

cuts.reason: Dieses Wort ist Kobalt reveal peak

master_timeline.notes: CENTERPIECE. Fullscreen Takeover 2/3. Deep Boom #2. Teal-Orange shift. Screen-shake 8f. MAX POLISH INVESTMENT. Phase 3B human-review required.
Micro-valley compensation for C006 (Kobalt->Rueckwirkung cluster). 19.5s decompression before ovl-016 StatCard. EU-Critical/Batterie/E-Auto supporting card.
Zweitens chapter. Strafzettel-Metapher. Sustained peak without valley (C006 compensation is the pre-valley micro-decompression).
Drittens chapter + BMF 2004 wird aufgehoben quote. Transition to mb-03 cold-pattern at 345s / 10350f.

pattern_interrupt.note: Letterbox 1/3 on 'keinen einzigen Cent'. Fullscreen Takeover 3/3 at 10872f (ovl-024).

master_timeline.notes: L2 closes. Fullscreen Takeover ovl-024 '0,00 EUR · VERLUST RESERVEN'. T&O peak 2/3.
L5 opens. China pattern setup. Didactic-cold valley.
Chronology data-kaskade. Glitch-reveal on ovl-030 'GENAU JETZT · LETZTE INFRASTRUKTUR WEG' (Glitch budget 1/5).

pattern_interrupt.note: Begin cool -> neutral transition at color_shift PI

master_timeline.notes: L5 closes. 8-second major riser. Hole-tiefpunkt. China vs Russland vs DE split screen.

master_timeline.music_bed: mb-04 crossfade from mb-03 @500s (start), ambient-low during pause
master_timeline.notes: BREATH PAUSE 6.1s. NO overlays (C2 rule). NO zoom. Music ambient-low. Required after Peak-cluster for hedonic reset.
First gain-frame moment. Grade transitions neutral -> warm over 60f. 'Altbestand sicher' beruhigung.
WARM PAYOFF — NOT climax polish. Gold grade. Tonal whoosh + warm bass hit (NOT deep boom). Calming, resolving. L3 closes.
Bookend-reference to seg_001 '5 Stunden'. Daniels core message + stolz-frame.
BREATH PAUSE 5s. Pre-CTA reset. No overlays, no zoom.

pattern_interrupt.note: ovl-new-001 Handelsblatt/FAZ fills 1B critical dead zone. Downgraded from 1D FT per C007.

master_timeline.notes: C003 resolution: NEW overlay ovl-new-001 fills the 618-666s dead zone at 645s. Hard-CTA ovl-036 at 666s (BMF-PDF + Erstgespraech).
20 Jahre Finanzbranche authority-anchor.
Bookend refrain. L1 closes at end of segment.
Closer punch. Deep Boom #3 on 'Danke, Deutschland'. Cold accent over warm base per script vorgabe. 'Euer Daniel Sauer' signature.

ovl-new-001 Handelsblatt/FAZ NewsCard — NEW component, needs real press logos sourced and design approval
Teal-Orange LUT calibration — 2 T&O windows need real render preview vs target HSL values
Color grade transitions col_004->col_005 and col_006->col_007 — asymmetric 20f/40f needs render preview to verify no jank
Deep Boom #2 Kobalt — needs sub-bass calibration + silence-before timing test render
Music bed crossfade mb-03->mb-04 at 500s — 4s crossfade must land cleanly on drei-mal-refrain
Cut at 10872f (ovl-024 FullscreenTakeover entry) — crash-zoom timing needs frame-accurate preview

checks.hook_cold_desaturated: PASS (col_001 overrides D1.1 warm-hook rule deliberately per Daniel pain-emotion)
checks.breath_pause_after_peak: PASS (ts_015 after ts_014, ts_019 before CTA)
checks.cta_timing: ACCEPTED_DRIFT (real 83.9% vs target 55-75%; compensated via ovl-006 early soft-CTA at 7%)
checks.peak_valley_rhythm: PASS_WITH_EXCEPTIONS (seg_007->seg_008 peak-cluster compensated by ts_008 micro-valley; max peak-to-peak gap 99s = 9s over 90s limit, 1A approved)

warnings.desc: Fullscreen takeover budget at MAX (3/3). No more fullscreens can be added in Phase 3B.
CTA drift accepted (83.9% vs target 55-75%). Retention risk if viewers leave before 638s. Mitigated via early soft-CTA at 47s.
Peak-cluster ts_007->ts_009 technically violates E2 'HIGH must have LOW after 45-90s'. Compensated by ts_008 19.5s micro-valley, but not a full valley. Phase 4 QC should monitor retention curve here.
Max talking-head stretch at Phase 3C is 45s (698-743s segment). At 45-60s target boundary per 1D. No PI possible without breaking pacing narrative.
ovl-new-001 is a NEW component not in the existing library. Requires build + design approval before render.
